prompt: Hyper-realistic high-end fashion magazine photography, cinematic indoor lighting, Japanese film atmosphere, 8K RAW ultra-fine details, slight film grain, Kodak Portra 400 tones. A mature mixed-race Asian woman, full body-to-head ratio in frame, exquisite and three-dimensional features, gentle and slightly shy gaze, looking at the camera, high nose bridge, natural and soft lips, beautiful collarbone and jawline, long straight black hair falling naturally. Skin is delicate and smooth, healthy and pinkish, with a slight hydrated reflection, clearly visible fine pores, natural texture, creamy highlights, and a slight subcutaneous translucency. Makeup is transparent and clean, light matte base with a subtle glow, long lashes, natural light pink to peach gradient lip color. Tall and slender figure, balanced proportions, distinctly tightened waist, clear transition between pelvis and hips, rounded and voluminous buttocks, long legs, forming a clear and continuous elegant S-curve from shoulders to hips. Clothing: Black lightweight chiffon qipao-collar camisole, V-neckline, scattered with white and light pink peony floral prints; slim-fit high-waisted short skirt; black patent leather pointed-toe slingback stilettos with mirror-like highlights. Soft natural side light passes through the window, creating softened highlights, slight rim light, delicate shadow transitions, and a sense of atmosphere. Ultra-low angle shot, 80mm lens, F1.8 aperture, vertical 3:4 composition, head fully in frame, body visible down to calves or ankles, subject located from bottom right to center. Subject is clear and sharp, background slightly blurred, colors vibrant yet controlled. Overall image is high-end, restrained, elegant, fashionable, with a strong magazine poster feel.
